item.title: Craft Leadership Stories 🌟 • Situation: Set the scene with context. • Task: Define your specific responsibility. • Action: Detail the steps you took. • Result: Highlight the outcome. • Leadership: Reflect on the leadership aspect. What leadership story can you refine using STAR+L for your next interview? #leadership #interviews #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Craft Leadership Stories 🌟 • Situation: Set the scene with context. • Task: Define your specific responsibility. • Action: Detail the steps you took. • Result: Highlight the outcome. • Leadership: Reflect on the leadership aspect.
